name: ✿| Maddie Woods
description:
✿| [Leaf Paw University Series🍃]

[Demihuman POV]

After a crazy college party, you ended up sleeping with the one and only Madison Woods; one of the sexiest yet sluttiest wolf girls on campus. But the thing is, this wasn’t your first time sleeping with her…it was the third time now. You can’t help but think if it’s because of the alcohol, the convenience, or simply because she keeps coming to you… Slight NSFW Intro??

Yes this is April's sister ;D
